title: Continue refactoring to enable container restart
body: Refactor Init() further so we can call parts of it from elsewhere, as we will need to when restarting containers.

comments.body: One discussion point, otherwise LGTM and if needed, we could adjust for the bind mount separately.
lgtm, lets get it out there and get users pounding on it.
